zh.Sterborough Castle, Lingfield, Surrey, E: 英國素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素
zh.Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham於1348年6月8日出生在英國素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素時，他的父親Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham48歲，母親Joane de Berkeley23歲。他於1370年4月14日之後與Elizabeth Stafford在英國素瑞令費爾德結婚。他去世於1403年7月3日在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國素瑞令費爾德。

zh-hans.Sterborough Castle, Lingfield, Surrey, E: 英国素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素
zh-hans.Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England: 英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham于1348年6月8日出生在英国素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素时，他的父亲Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham48岁，母亲Joane de Berkeley23岁。他于1370年4月14日之后与Elizabeth Stafford在英国素瑞令費爾德结婚。他去世于1403年7月3日在他的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在英国素瑞令費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Cobham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of at least three places in southern England called Cobham, in Kent, Surrey, and Sussex.

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham was born on 8 June 1348, in Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, his father, Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham, was 48 and his mother, Joane de Berkeley, was 23. He married Elizabeth Stafford after 14 April 1370, in Lingfield, Surrey, England. He died on 3 July 1403, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Lingfield, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham est né le 8 juin 1348, à Sterborough Castle, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Joane de Berkeley, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Stafford après 14 avril 1370, à Lingfield, Surrey, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 3 juillet 1403, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Lingfield, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham am 8. Juni 1348 in Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham 48 und seine Mutter Joane de Berkeley 23. Er hat nach 14. April 1370 in Lingfield, Surrey, England Elizabeth Stafford geheiratet. Er starb am 3. Juli 1403 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lingfield, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham è nato il il 8 giugno 1348 nel Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, il suo padre, Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Joane de Berkeley, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Stafford dopo il 14 aprile 1370, nel Lingfield, Surrey, England. Morì il 3 luglio 1403, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Lingfield, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobhamが1348年6月8日にイギリススリーステルボロウ カストルで生まれた時，父Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobhamは48歳，母Joane de Berkeleyは23歳であった。1370年4月14日以後にイギリススリーリングフィールドでElizabeth Staffordと結婚した。彼は1403年7月3日に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリススリーリングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham(이)가 1348년 6월 8일 영국 수리 스터버루그h 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane de Berkeley(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1370년 4월 14일 이후 영국 수리 링필드에서 Elizabeth Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1403년 7월 3일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 링필드에 묻혔다.

mn.8 June 1348–3 July 1403: 1348 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 8–1403 оны Долоодугаар сарын 3
mn.Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England: Gloucester, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.8 June 1348–3 July 1403: 8 de junho de 1348–3 de julho de 1403
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham nasceu em 8 de junho de 1348, em Sterborough Castle, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Joane de Berkeley, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Stafford após 14 de abril de 1370, em Lingfield, Surrey, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 3 de julho de 1403, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Lingfield, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham родился 8 июня 1348 г. в местности стирбороую кастл, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane de Berkeley, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Stafford после 14 апрель 1370 г. в местности лингфиелд, сурри, Англия. Он умер 3 июля 1403 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности лингфиелд, сурри, Англия.

es.8 June 1348–3 July 1403: 8 de junio de 1348–3 de julio de 1403
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham nació el 8 de junio de 1348, en Sterborough Castle, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Reginald Cobham 1st Baron Cobham, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Joane de Berkeley, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Stafford después de 14 de abril de 1370, en Lingfield, Surrey, Inglaterra. Murió el 3 de julio de 1403, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Lingfield, Surrey, Inglaterra.
